name: Financial Processing Staff
description: Staff handling routine financial transactions including AP, AR, payroll, tax processing, and general accounting operations.

name: Financial Management
description: Managers and controllers with approval authority over financial processes and reporting.

name: Procurement Operations
description: Staff handling purchase orders, requisitions, and basic vendor interactions.

name: Procurement Management
description: Managers with contract authority, vendor creation rights, and strategic sourcing access.

name: Warehouse Operations
description: Staff handling daily warehouse transactions including receiving, putaway, and shipping.

name: Warehouse Management
description: Managers with inventory planning, storage configuration, and exception handling authority.

name: Maintenance Operations
description: Technicians and planners handling work orders, notifications, and routine maintenance tasks.

name: Maintenance Management
description: Supervisors with equipment management, scheduling authority, and resource allocation.

name: Quality Operations
description: Inspectors and analysts performing routine quality checks and documentation.

name: Quality Management
description: Managers with quality planning, certification, and compliance authority.

name: HR Operations
description: Staff handling employee records, time entry, and routine HR transactions.

name: HR Management
description: Managers with payroll execution, compensation management, and policy administration.

name: Sales Operations
description: Staff handling sales orders, deliveries, and customer service transactions.

name: IT Operations
description: Staff handling user support, monitoring, and basic system administration.

name: IT Administration
description: Administrators with user management, role configuration, and system customization authority.

name: Engineering Operations
description: Engineers handling technical documentation, change management, and project support.
